snippet: Refresh your skillset with 50% off Pro. PRO SALE 50% off Refresh your expertise with skills employers are looking for like AI, data, and cybersecurity, and more. Get 50% off Pro, including access to
subject: Get 50% off Pro
body:
Refresh your skillset with 50% off Pro.








PRO SALE 

50% off 


Refresh your expertise with skills employers are looking for like AI, data, 
and cybersecurity, and more. Get 50% off Pro, including access to our hands-on 
AI Builder.

Get 50% off Pro  
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=LEARNMARCH26&plan_type=pro>
 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=LEARNMARCH26&plan_type=pro>



Your Pro plan includes:






Hands-on, interactive learning


Unlock a personalized learning roadmap as you build real, working prototypes 
with the AI Builder.






Step-by-step guidance


 Gain the skills you need to land the job you want with career paths in data 
science, full-stack development, and more.






Top industry certifications


Pro gives you exclusive access to our latest catalog releases, like new paths 
to prep for top industry certifications from AWS, Microsoft, CompTIA, and more.




Refresh your skillset with Codecademy Pro

Join Pro now  
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=LEARNMARCH26&plan_type=pro>



*50% Off offer valid from March 10, 2026 at 12:00:00 am Eastern Time ("ET") 
and ends at 11:59:59 pm ET on March 19, 2026. Discount is only applicable to 
new annual subscription plans (excluding Codecademy Plus, Student, and Teams), 
and cannot be combined with any other offer. Discount applies to the first year 
of a new subscription, after which the subscription will auto-renew for 
subsequent years at the regular price. Code valid one time only. Discount 
applies to certain products and not all products are available in all 
countries. Discount is not applicable to taxes. Codecademy reserves the right 
to modify or cancel this promotion at any time without notice. Any subscription 
plan purchases are subject to Codecademy'sTerms of Service 
<https://www.codecademy.com/terms?utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=email>.
